name: Zerve
description: Agentic data science development environment with serverless compute for Python, R and SQL and a distributed parallel-execution Fleet.

seo.title: Zerve — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Zerve: Agentic data science development environment with serverless compute for Python, R and SQL and a distributed parallel-execution Fleet.

when_to_use: Running collaborative data science notebooks in the cloud
Sharing and reproducing ML experiments with versioned environments
Building data pipelines with scheduled notebook execution
Onboarding data teams to a unified cloud notebook platform

pros: Agentic IDE for Python, R and SQL
review.verdict: Interesting bet on agentic data science IDEs; worth a pilot but not a full migration yet.
review.best_for: Data science teams curious about agent-driven notebooks with distributed compute
review.not_for: Teams deeply invested in Jupyter, Hex or Databricks who need stable tooling
